items.docs: Returns the registry-wide metadata document. Lists optional source-archive mirrors and the base path for `local_path` source types. May be absent on minimal registries.
Returns the module-level metadata document — homepage, maintainers, available versions, and any yanked versions with their explanations.

params.name: version
params.description: Module version string. Bazel uses an extended SemVer ordering that also tolerates suffixes such as `1.2.3.bcr.1`.

items.docs: Returns the MODULE.bazel manifest for a specific version of a module. This is the Starlark file that declares the module's name, version, transitive bazel_dep() entries, module extensions, and use_repo() calls.

params.name: version
params.description: Module version string. Bazel uses an extended SemVer ordering that also tolerates suffixes such as `1.2.3.bcr.1`.

items.docs: Returns fetch instructions for the module source — archive URL and integrity hash, git repository + commit, or local path. Bazel uses this to download and stage the module source on disk.

params.name: version
params.description: Module version string. Bazel uses an extended SemVer ordering that also tolerates suffixes such as `1.2.3.bcr.1`.

items.docs: Returns the Buildkite-format presubmit CI configuration the BCR uses to verify each module version. This file is specific to the Bazel Central Registry — it is not part of the generic index-registry protocol.
